default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on content marketing strategy and goals for Shapes AI with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goals: Drive website traffic, convert to MQLs, prove marketing value to board](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Focus: 80% top-of-funnel content, 20% sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Target audience: Decision-makers (CTOs, VPs) and implementers (ML engineers, data scientists)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Current acquisition: Mainly top-down through outbound efforts; aiming to improve inbound](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [GrowthX team: Kyle (strategy), Jakub (content/SEO), David (managing editor), Nicolas (account manager)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Shapes AI: Nic Scheltema (marketing lead), background in AI/ML, product at Uber](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Goals and Priorities

  - [Increase website traffic significantly](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Convert visitors to MQLs (anyone from ICP visiting site considered MQL)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Create sales enablement content (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Prove marketing's value to board](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Current Marketing Status

  - [Recently implemented lead capture tools (HubSpot, Koala, Clay)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Moving from "zero to one" in lead generation and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Content distribution challenges on platforms like Reddit and Hacker News](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Paid ads on Reddit yielding \~$0.17 CPC](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Balance between marketing site (for decision-makers) and docs (for implementers)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose docs content into traffic-generating articles](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Need for engaging content to keep visitors on site](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

### Measurement and Conversion

  - [Basic funnel: Traffic → MQL → SQL → Closed deal](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Working on implementing proper tracking and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Aiming for \~50,000 visitors as a soft target based on paid ad performance](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share current marketing channel tests and site optimization efforts with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to integrate GrowthX efforts with other marketing initiatives (e.g., webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Analyze docs content for potential traffic-generating opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Develop strategy to balance technical content with high-level marketing messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Set up follow-up meeting to dive deeper into conversion tracking and measurement](https://fathom.video/share/Lx4sHyFd3TyQD7CnKSFxrvNw1rjJXApq?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

action_items.description: Set up direct communication channel w/ Nic as primary POC
Add Dan (mentioned stakeholder) to project communication channels
Provide GrowthX access to HubSpot for conversion data
Share current marketing channels being tested w/ GrowthX team
